decisions.what: Replaced hero section HTML structure in index.html
decisions.why: Task specification required complete hero section with semantic HTML, headline 'Partner in Sustainable Rotation Crop Farming', compelling subheadline, CTA button 'Explore Partnership Opportunities', and background image integration using Unsplash URL

decisions.what: Added .hero-section, .hero-background, .hero-overlay, .hero-content, .hero-headline, .hero-subheadline, and .cta-primary styles to components.css
decisions.why: Specification required background image handling with background-size: cover, background-position: center, text overlay with linear-gradient for readability, responsive layout using Flexbox, and CTA button styling with hover/focus/active states

decisions.what: Used button element instead of anchor for CTA in hero section
decisions.why: Following HTML semantic patterns where button is appropriate for interactive actions, with proper ARIA attributes as specified

decisions.what: Implemented gradient overlay with rgba transparency values
decisions.why: Specification required linear-gradient with alpha transparency to ensure text readability over background image

decisions.what: Applied CSS custom properties (--accent-gold, --neutral-dark, --white, etc.) for button colors and states
decisions.why: Specification required using CSS custom properties for colors, maintaining consistency with existing base.css patterns

decisions.what: Used clamp() for responsive typography in hero headline and subheadline
decisions.why: Following existing project pattern for fluid responsive typography across all screen sizes

decisions.what: Added text-shadow to headline and subheadline for enhanced readability
decisions.why: Improves text contrast against background image, ensuring accessibility

decisions.what: Positioned hero content using relative positioning with z-index layering
decisions.why: Specification required proper semantic structure with background, overlay, and content layers

decisions.what: Implemented hover, focus, and active states for .cta-primary button
decisions.why: Specification explicitly required CTA button styling with hover/focus/active states for interactive feedback

decisions.what: Used isolation: isolate on .hero-section
decisions.why: Creates stacking context to ensure proper z-index layering of background, overlay, and content elements

decisions.what: Implemented agricultural color scheme with CSS custom properties
decisions.why: Specification required primary-green, secondary-brown, accent-gold, and neutral colors for agricultural theme

decisions.what: Created comprehensive CSS reset and normalization
decisions.why: Foundation requirement for consistent cross-browser rendering

decisions.what: Established responsive typography using clamp() function
decisions.why: Specification required fluid typography scaling for h1, h2, and body text

decisions.what: Used system font stack for typography
decisions.why: Specification explicitly requested -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto stack

decisions.what: Created reusable button components with primary and secondary variants
decisions.why: Component specification required CTA buttons with hover/active/disabled states

decisions.what: Implemented card components for testimonials and benefits
decisions.why: Specification required card styles with subtle shadows and proper spacing

decisions.what: Built form components with focus/error/success states
decisions.why: Specification required comprehensive form element styling with state management

decisions.what: Created GPU-accelerated animations using transform and opacity
decisions.why: Specification required performance-optimized animations

decisions.what: Implemented scroll reveal animations with fade-in and slide-up effects
decisions.why: Animation specification required scroll-triggered reveal animations

decisions.what: Added @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) rules
decisions.why: Specification explicitly required accessibility support for users preferring reduced motion

decisions.what: Implemented mobile-first responsive design with 768px and 1024px breakpoints
decisions.why: Responsive specification required mobile base (320px+), tablet (768px+), desktop (1024px+) breakpoints

decisions.what: Created hamburger menu navigation for mobile with full navigation for desktop
decisions.why: Specification required responsive navigation pattern

decisions.what: Ensured minimum 44px touch target sizes
decisions.why: Specification required touch-friendly button sizes with 44px minimum

decisions.what: Used CSS Grid and Flexbox for responsive layouts
decisions.why: Specification explicitly requested CSS Grid and Flexbox usage
